note: Marker that flags this as a T4 repo — the hooks fire only when this file is present, so they never touch a non-T4 repo. Set "verify" to a FAST test command (unit+build+lint; leave e2e to CI) to arm the ship gate: t4-gate RUNS it before `gh pr merge` and blocks on failure. Empty = off; keep it in sync with .github/workflows/t4-verify.yml. Set "autoMerge" (or "afk") true during an unattended run so `gh pr merge` doesn't stop to ask for review confirmation — the verify deny still applies. "afk": true additionally lets the gate permit `git reset --hard`/`git clean` for reverting a parked item to green (force-push and `branch -D` stay blocked).
